dimensional.core_objective: Systematically map and interpret competitive dynamics to inform product strategy and prioritization.
dimensional.success_criteria: Within 3 months: updated competitive matrix with feature, pricing, and messaging benchmarks; documented whitespace opportunities validated by at least two customer interviews; and quarterly competitive signal dashboard live in BI tool.

dimensions.name: Landscape Mapping
subtasks: Identify top 5 direct & adjacent competitors → Deliverable: Competitor shortlist
Classify by business model, TAM, and growth stage
Track public signals (funding, hires, press)

dimensions.name: Feature & UX Benchmarking
subtasks: Audit core workflows across competitors → Deliverable: Feature parity matrix
Capture UI/UX patterns via screenshot + annotation
Map user pain points from app store/G2 reviews (Estimated: 2h)

dimensions.name: Strategy Synthesis
subtasks: Extract messaging themes and value props → Deliverable: Positioning heatmap
Infer roadmap priorities from changelogs & blogs
Identify 3 whitespace opportunities with validation criteria (Estimated: 1.5h)

dimensional.core_objective: Systematically evaluate and rank candidate features using balanced, evidence-informed criteria to maximize product value and strategic coherence.
dimensional.success_criteria: Within 3 months: 100% of shipped features align with top-3 ranked items from the latest quarterly prioritization cycle; stakeholder disagreement on rankings reduced by ≥40% (measured via pre/post alignment survey).

dimensions.name: Value Assessment
subtasks: Quantify customer impact using usage data or interview insights
Estimate revenue or retention lift (e.g., cohort analysis)
Score strategic fit against OKRs (1–5 scale)

dimensions.name: Effort & Feasibility
subtasks: Gather engineering estimate (T-shirt sizing or story points)
Identify dependencies and cross-team blockers
Assess risk exposure (tech debt, compliance, timeline)

dimensions.name: Validation & Evidence
subtasks: Review supporting research (surveys, A/B tests, support tickets)
Confirm problem-solution fit with recent user feedback
Document assumptions and confidence level (Low/Med/High)

dimensional.core_objective: Systematically increase net new active users while improving cohort-based retention and conversion efficiency.
dimensional.success_criteria: 3-month lift in 30-day active user count by ≥15%, with ≥70% Day-7 retention for new signups and ≥25% conversion from trial to paid.

subtasks: Audit current traffic sources and CAC per channel

subtasks: Map and instrument key activation events (e.g., first task completion)

dimensions.name: Retention & Re-engagement
subtasks: Segment users by engagement tier and churn risk
Launch automated email/SMS re-engagement sequences
Introduce win-back incentive for lapsed users (Estimated: 4h)

dimensional.core_objective: Design a statistically sound, operationally executable A/B test that isolates causal impact on a defined primary metric.
dimensional.success_criteria: Within 3 months: at least one A/B test launched with pre-registered hypothesis, power-calculated sample size, validated randomization, and guardrail monitoring in place.

dimensions.name: Hypothesis & Metrics
subtasks: Define primary success metric and directional hypothesis
Select 2–3 guardrail metrics to detect unintended side effects
Specify minimum detectable effect (MDE) based on business impact

dimensions.name: Statistical Design
subtasks: Calculate required sample size and test duration using baseline rate and MDE
Set significance level (α) and statistical power (1−β)
Document assumptions (e.g., variance, seasonality, dropout rate)

dimensions.name: Operational Setup
subtasks: Define user segmentation and randomization unit (e.g., user ID, session)
Map variant assignment logic and ensure consistency across systems
Configure logging and metric collection pipelines (Estimated: 4h)
